title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer visualises pre-computed Achilles characterisation results for a selected data source. It provides an overview of patient counts, demographic distributions, domain coverage, and data quality summaries without running any new queries.
tips: Select a source from the top dropdown to load its Achilles results.
The Overview tab gives a quick sanity check: total patients, observation years, and domain record counts.
Domain drilldown (Conditions, Drugs, etc.) shows the most prevalent concepts — useful for data characterisation.
Temporal Trends shows patient inflow/outflow over time — inspect for data truncation or upload gaps.
Results are only as fresh as the last Achilles run. Contact your admin if counts look stale.
